blockers: The branch does not contain the accepted Group A new-ui-evaluation/ app tree, so task build:new-ui-eval cannot be executed here.

The branch does not contain the accepted Group B deploy/kind/control-plane/new-ui-evaluation-*.yaml manifests, so rollout/status/log/smoke tasks cannot be exercised against a preview deployment and kustomize inclusion could not be repaired within owned paths.
Because the preview app and manifests are absent, Kubernetes deployment, image load, and endpoint smoke verification remain pending after those artifacts are merged.
summary: Implemented the owned deployment wiring for the new UI evaluation preview without changing existing web app semantics. The expected branch was pushed at 39fe30d8486e72409c5cf1e62fa5be70b3ef255a. Full build/deploy verification is blocked until the accepted Group A app tree and Group B preview manifests are present on this branch.
tasks_completed: Added kind host/node port mapping defaults for the new UI preview: host port 8880 and nodePort 30880.
Added Taskfile variables and commands for new UI preview image build, kind load, restart, status, logs, smoke, and preview URL output.
Added Dockerfile packaging for the assumed flat new-ui-evaluation/ Vite app layout, building the frontend and running adapter.py on 0.0.0.0:8080 with dist and fixtures.
Inventoried current web app deployment/service/lifecycle paths and marked OpenSpec task 1.1 complete.
